name: Deviled Chicken Cutlets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oven rack in the upper third of the oven. Heat the oven to 450°F.
2. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and lightly coat it with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Place chicken pieces on the foil.
4. Stir together mayonnaise, mustard, garlic, sage, and hot pepper sauce in a small bowl until well blended. Brush evenly over the top of the chicken cutlets.
5. Mix together crumbs and salt in a small bowl. Sprinkle half of the mixture evenly over the top of the chicken cutlets.
6. Turn the chicken over; repeat brushing with the mayonnaise mixture and sprinkling with the remaining crumbs.
7. Bake in the upper third of the 450°F oven for 15 minutes, or until the chicken is no longer pink in the center and the crumbs are golden.
